授業目的: This course provides an overview of the environment of modern Japan from the mid-19th century to the present day paying equal attention to history and sociopolitical analysis.
到達目標: After taking this course students will gain a general historical understanding of the environment in Japan since the mid-19th century as well as knowledge of analytical perspectives and theoretical concepts for the study of the environment in general.
